title: RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED — A transaction has been debited against an envelope
description: Domain-event-DDD payload published by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET on every successful CMD.RECORD_CONSUMPTION. Always emitted on a successful debit. When the same debit causes the envelope to reach its cap, RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CAP_REACHED is also emitted in the same transaction (see INV.ENV.004).

amount.description: Debit amount applied by this consumption.

consumed_amount_after.description: Total consumed_amount of the envelope after applying this debit.

remaining_amount.description: cap_amount - consumed_amount_after. Zero when the envelope is exactly capped (paired RVT.ENVELOPE_CAP_REACHED in same transaction).

transaction_id.description: Reference to the underlying transaction (for traceability).

causation_event_id.description: Identifier of the upstream transaction-authorised resource event that triggered the debit.
